content: Number Series — Find the missing number: 3, 6, 11, 18, 27, 38, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 2, 5, 14, 41, 122, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 4, 9, 20, 43, 90, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 5, 15, 45, 135, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 10, 11, 13, 17, 25, ?
explanation: Differences are prime numbers: +1, +2, +4, +8, +16 → 25+16=41.

content: Number Series — Find the missing number: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, ?
explanation: Fibonacci sequence: each number is the sum of the two preceding ones. 8+13=21.

content: Number Series — Find the missing number: 1, 8, 27, 64, 125, ?
explanation: These are perfect cubes: 1³=1, 2³=8, 3³=27, 4³=64, 5³=125, 6³=216.

content: Number Series — Find the missing number: 100, 97, 91, 82, 70, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 3, 7, 15, 31, 63, ?
Number Series — Find the missing number: 6, 13, 25, 51, 101, ?
Blood Relations — Ravi's father is Mohan's only son. How is Mohan related to Ravi?
explanation: Mohan's only son is Ravi's father. So Mohan is the grandfather of Ravi.

content: Blood Relations — A is the mother of B. B is the sister of C. D is the son of C. How is A related to D?
explanation: A is mother of B. B and C are siblings (B is sister of C). D is son of C. So A is grandmother of D.

content: Blood Relations — A woman says 'He is the son of the only son of my grandfather.' Who is he to her?
explanation: Her grandfather's only son is her father. His son is her brother.

content: Blood Relations — If Neha is the daughter of Anita and Anita is the sister of Suresh, then Suresh is Neha's?
explanation: Anita is Neha's mother. Suresh is Anita's brother. So Suresh is Neha's maternal uncle.

content: Blood Relations — Pointing to a man, a lady said 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' The man is the lady's?
explanation: The only daughter of the lady's mother is the lady herself. So the man's mother is the lady herself. He is her son.

content: Blood Relations — A's mother is the sister of B's father. A and B are?
explanation: A's mother and B's father are siblings. So A and B share a grandparent — they are cousins.

content: Blood Relations — If A is the brother of B, B is the sister of C, C is the father of D, then how is A related to D?
explanation: A and B are siblings. B is sister of C, so A and C are siblings. C is D's father. A is D's uncle.

content: Blood Relations — In a portrait, Raj says 'Her mother is the wife of my father's son. I have no siblings.' Who is in the portrait?
explanation: Raj has no siblings, so 'my father's son' is Raj himself. The wife of Raj is her mother. So 'her' is Raj's daughter.

content: Blood Relations — X and Y are brothers. Z is the father of X. W is the son of Y. How is W related to Z?
explanation: Z is X's father. X and Y are brothers, so Z is also Y's father. W is Y's son, so W is Z's grandson.

content: Blood Relations — P is the father of Q. R is the daughter of S. S is the wife of Q. How is P related to R?
explanation: P is Q's father. Q is married to S. R is S's daughter, so R is Q's daughter. P is R's grandfather.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) 8  B) 27  C) 64  D) 100
explanation: 8=2³, 27=3³, 64=4³ are perfect cubes. 100 is not a perfect cube.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Mercury  B) Venus  C) Moon  D) Mars
explanation: Mercury, Venus, and Mars are planets. The Moon is a natural satellite, not a planet.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Crow  B) Sparrow  C) Bat  D) Parrot
explanation: Crow, Sparrow, and Parrot are birds. Bat is a mammal, not a bird.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) 17  B) 31  C) 43  D) 49
explanation: 17, 31, and 43 are prime numbers. 49 = 7×7 is not prime.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Hammer  B) Pliers  C) Spanner  D) Compass
explanation: Hammer, Pliers, and Spanner are mechanical/hand tools. Compass is a drawing/navigation instrument.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) 4  B) 9  C) 16  D) 20
explanation: 4=2², 9=3², 16=4² are perfect squares. 20 is not a perfect square.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Copper  B) Iron  C) Coal  D) Aluminium
explanation: Copper, Iron, and Aluminium are metals. Coal is a non-metallic fossil fuel.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Violin  B) Guitar  C) Sitar  D) Flute
explanation: Violin, Guitar, and Sitar are string instruments. Flute is a wind instrument.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) February  B) April  C) June  D) August
explanation: February has 28/29 days, April has 30, June has 30. August has 31 days — the odd one out.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group? A) Square  B) Rectangle  C) Rhombus  D) Cube
explanation: Square, Rectangle, and Rhombus are 2D (flat) shapes. Cube is a 3D solid shape.
